Metadata.Goal: Define executable runtime DataSubgraphContract and fact-grade boundaries before control/persistence rewrites.
Metadata.Description: 建立 runtime 数据子图契约、事实等级和首批 AI runtime data component owner，为后续控制面、conversation spine、lifecycle、persistence 和 surface tracks 提供硬边界。

TaskGroup.name: Contract Shape And Fact Grades
TaskGroup.Description: 定义 DataSubgraphContract shape 和 runtime fact grade。

Task.name: Add failing tests for contract shape
Task.Description: 新增 contract shape 和 fact grade 的失败测试。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 测试能覆盖 owned facts、derived nodes、write commands、read views、not-owned-here。

Task.name: Implement runtime data subgraph contract types
Task.Description: 实现 DataSubgraphContract、FactGrade 和 helper 类型。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 类型可被后续 AI domain components 复用。

TaskGroup.name: Core Data Components
TaskGroup.Description: 定义首批 runtime data components。

Task.name: Declare core AI runtime data components
Task.Description: 声明 ActorRuntime、AiTurnState、History、LLM Context、Session、ToolCall、ProviderCall、RuntimeControl、CheckpointSnapshot（最小 owner contract）、SurfaceProjection contract。LLM Context contract 必须对齐现有 conversation prompt domain 的 generation/basis/transform/overlay 概念。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 每个 component 都有 owner、read/write boundary 和 Not Owned Here。

Task.name: Add not-owned-here assertions
Task.Description: 补充禁止 journal/checkpoint/projection/surface 成为 live truth 的断言。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: 负向测试覆盖 snapshot、journal、surface 三类误用。

TaskGroup.name: Conformance Cases
TaskGroup.Description: 固化历史问题对应的 contract conformance cases。

Task.name: Add provider context and tool result conformance cases
Task.Description: 验证 effect evidence 不等于 provider-visible tool result，provider context 不读 journal/checkpoint。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: conformance cases 覆盖 Provider Context 与 Tool Result Truth。

Task.name: Add formal history and surface projection conformance cases
Task.Description: 验证 checkpoint snapshot 不拥有 Formal History，surface projection 不写 domain truth。

cdt:Acceptance.cdt:Criterion: conformance cases 覆盖 Formal History 与 SurfaceProjection。
